items.title: Are we there yet? A journey into transport data
items.source_url:
https://events.compiledmcr.com/

Ever wondered what's powering your favourite journey planner

enrichment_health.status:
failed: URL can't contain control characters. "/

Ever wondered what's powering your favourite journey planner? Or how CityMapper somehow knows your bus is running three minutes late before the driver does?

Open data has quietly transformed the way we move around — from the apps we tap before leaving the house to the behind-the-scenes feeds that keep public transport ticking. It underpins a huge range of transport services we rely on every day, and with the Bus Services Act 2025 pushing more bus data into the open, there's never been a better moment to take stock of where we've got to — and where we still need to go.

We'll be looking at road transport too: open data on scheduled roadworks and live fuel prices has given drivers a fighting chance of making genuinely informed decisions about their journeys.

At this event we want to dig into the great things open transport data has made possible, hear some real examples of services and insights it's enabled, and have an honest conversation about the challenges that remain for people getting around.

" (found at least ' ')

Join us on the terrace at Neo for a relaxed social evening with drinks and nibbles in our beautiful mezzanine lounge.

Female Founders North brings together digital and tech founders from across the region in a safe, supportive environment to share stories, experiences, and build meaningful connections through informal networking.

This is your opportunity to:

  • Expand your tech and digital network

  • Discuss barriers, challenges, and opportunities with fellow entrepreneurs

  • Connect with founders who have navigated similar journeys or are currently on their entrepreneurial path

  • Be part of a thriving community that's been running successfully in Leeds for over two years and recently expanded to Manchester

Bruntwood SciTech has successfully delivered Female Founders Incubators across Leeds, Manchester, and Alderley Park, helping startups grow and supporting the next generation of women-owned tech businesses.

This event is designed for:

  • Female Founders and Female Entrepreneurs

  • Female CEOs and Directors at similar levels

Allies who can support women on their entrepreneurial journey are very welcome

If you are a consultant or intermediary, please explain why you wish to attend in the additional comments box when applying for your ticket.

  • Due to venue capacity, we can only accept one person per company

  • This is a quarterly event, so don't miss this opportunity to connect with your community
